item.title: Getting Started
item.description: Install kurel, build your first package, and explore runnable examples.

item.title: Concepts
item.description: The launcher design, the OAM data model, and the key design decisions behind kurel packages.

item.title: Contributing
item.description: How to develop, test, and ship changes to launcher, plus the CI/CD workflows.

item.title: API Reference
item.description: Reference documentation for launcher’s public Go packages. Each page below is auto-synced from the package README.md. For the full Go API, see pkg.go.dev/github.com/go-kure/launcher. CLI Package Description Reference kurel CLI kurel command tree, flags, and usage pkg.go.dev OAM Package Description Reference OAM Model OAM data model, parser, and transform pipeline pkg.go.dev Component Handlers Built-in component types (webservice, worker, cronjob, helmchart, …) pkg.go.dev Trait Handlers Built-in traits (ingress, certificate, scaler, externalsecret, …) pkg.go.dev Libraries Package Description Reference Errors Structured error types and wrapping helpers pkg.go.dev Patch Engine Declarative JSONPath patching (TOML/YAML, strategic merge) pkg.go.dev
